summary: Tested Kalkulation feature: Settings tab with wage rates (Meister, Geselle, Azubi, Helfer) and surcharges (Materialzuschlag, Gewinnaufschlag), and KalkulationPanel in WYSIWYG document editor sidebar. Fixed missing GET /api/articles/{id} endpoint that was causing 'Fehler beim Aktualisieren' error.
passed_tests: Settings page has 'Kalkulation' tab with Calculator icon
Kalkulation tab shows Kalkulationsstufen section with Meisterlohn, Gesellenlohn, Azubi-Lohn, Helfer-Lohn inputs
Kalkulation tab shows Standard-Zuschläge section with Materialzuschlag (%) and Gewinnaufschlag (%) inputs
Default values loaded from settings (Meister=76.71, Geselle=72.12, Azubi=26, Helfer=68.5, Material=10%, Gewinn=15%)
Saving Kalkulation settings persists values correctly
Toast message 'Einstellungen gespeichert' appears on save
Document editor sidebar shows Leistungen/Artikel items with prices and EK values
Clicking a Leistung/Artikel expands detail view with Calculator button
Calculator button opens KalkulationPanel with all required fields
KalkulationPanel shows EK-Preis input field
KalkulationPanel shows 4 wage-level time inputs (Meister, Geselle, Azubi, Helfer) with rates from settings
KalkulationPanel shows Sonstige Kosten section with '+ Hinzufügen' button
Adding sonstige Kosten works (name and amount inputs)
KalkulationPanel shows Materialzuschlag (%) and Gewinnaufschlag (%) inputs with defaults from settings
Calculation updates in real-time when inputs change
Calculation formula correct: VK = (EK + Lohnkosten + Sonstige) × (1 + Material%) × (1 + Gewinn%)
VK Netto (kalkuliert) displays calculated price
Comparison with current VK price shown (difference in green/red)
'VK-Preis übernehmen' button shows calculated price
'VK-Preis übernehmen' button updates article price in database
Success toast 'VK-Preis für ... auf X € aktualisiert' appears after apply
Closing panel via X button works
GET /api/articles/{id} endpoint returns single article
PUT /api/articles/{id} updates article price_net and ek_preis
critical_code_review_comments: Added missing GET /api/articles/{article_id} endpoint to fix 405 Method Not Allowed error
KalkulationPanel correctly uses settings.kalk_* values for wage rates and surcharges
Calculation formula implemented correctly in KalkulationPanel.jsx
seed_data_creation: Used existing quote A-2026-0021 and article 'Einrüstkosten/Sicherheitsrelevant' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kalkulation feature fully tested and working. Settings tab at /settings has Kalkulation tab with wage rates and surcharges. KalkulationPanel in document editor sidebar (/quotes/edit/{id}) opens when clicking Calculator button on expanded Leistung/Artikel. The panel calculates VK price based on EK, labor hours, sonstige costs, and surcharges. 'VK-Preis übernehmen' button updates the article's price_net in the database. Fixed missing GET /api/articles/{id} endpoint.

bug_fix_applied.issue: 405 Method Not Allowed when clicking 'VK-Preis übernehmen' button
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: Missing GET /api/articles/{article_id} endpoint in articles router
bug_fix_applied.verification: Apply button now successfully updates article price with success toast
